title: Plugin Manager for SystemLink Submission Manifest
description: Schema for thin manifest.json files in submissions/ directories. Package metadata is derived from the submitted .nipkg control file; the manifest binds the reviewed artifact to its hash and provenance.

schemaVersion.description: Submission manifest schema version. Version 2 indicates the thin manifest contract where package metadata is read from the .nipkg itself.

nipkgFile.description: Filename of the reviewed .nipkg artifact. It may be stored in this submission directory or resolved from sourceRepo/releaseTag during validation.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the exact .nipkg bytes reviewed in the submission.

sourceRepo.description: Optional source repository in owner/name format for provenance and review context.

releaseTag.description: Optional release tag associated with the reviewed artifact. Used for provenance and remote artifact resolution when the .nipkg is not stored in the repository.

sourceCommit.description: Optional source commit SHA for the build that produced the submitted .nipkg.

screenshots.description: Optional review and catalog screenshots stored alongside the manifest. These are not canonical package metadata.
